title: Pao de queijo brasil
author: Acfariac
attribution: “Pao de queijo brasil” by Acfariac, from Wikimedia Commons, licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0. Modified for SDDS: auto-oriented, converted to sRGB, proportionally resized to 640×427, and stripped of metadata; no endorsement implied.
changes: Stripped of EXIF, GPS, comments, thumbnails, and profiles.
tool_version:
Version: ImageMagick 7.1.2-27 Q16-HDRI aarch64 e4c2b403b:20260705 https://imagemagick.org
Copyright: (C) 1999 ImageMagick Studio LLC
License: https://imagemagick.org/license/
Features: Cipher DPC HDRI Modules
Delegates (built-in): bzlib freetype heic jng jpeg lcms ltdl lzma png tiff webp xml zlib zstd
Compiler: clang (21.0.0)
command: MAGICK_THREAD_LIMIT=1 magick Pao_de_queijo_brasil.jpg -auto-orient -colorspace sRGB -resize '640x640>' -strip -sampling-factor 4:2:0 -define jpeg:dct-method=islow -define jpeg:optimize-coding=false -interlace none -quality 82 tests/fixtures/media/pao-de-queijo-640x427.jpg
